text: AI employee experience platforms (2023-2026): (1) AI-powered onboarding -- ServiceNow and Workday use conversational AI to guide new hires through paperwork, training, and introductions. AI answers common questions, schedule orientation meetings, and track onboarding completion; (2) Learning and development -- Degreed, Docebo, and EdCast deploy AI to recommend personalized learning paths, identify skill gaps, and auto-generate training content; (3) Internal communications -- Staffbase and Poppulo use AI for personalized employee newsletters and engagement analytics.

AI employee listening and engagement: platforms like Qualtrics, Glint (Microsoft), and Culture Amp use NLP for sentiment analysis on employee surveys, always-on pulse feedback, and exit interviews. ML identifies engagement drivers, predicts turnover risk at individual and team level, and recommends interventions. Microsoft Viva (2021-2025) integrates employee experience AI across communications, learning, insights, and goals.
